title: GENEALOGIX File
description: Universal schema for any GENEALOGIX archive file. All GLX files use this structure with entity type keys containing maps of entities.

persons.description: Map of person entities, keyed by person ID (alphanumeric/hyphens, max 64 chars)

relationships.description: Map of relationship entities, keyed by relationship ID (alphanumeric/hyphens, max 64 chars)

events.description: Map of event entities, keyed by event ID (alphanumeric/hyphens, max 64 chars)

places.description: Map of place entities, keyed by place ID (alphanumeric/hyphens, max 64 chars)

sources.description: Map of source entities, keyed by source ID (alphanumeric/hyphens, max 64 chars)

citations.description: Map of citation entities, keyed by citation ID (alphanumeric/hyphens, max 64 chars)

repositories.description: Map of repository entities, keyed by repository ID (alphanumeric/hyphens, max 64 chars)

assertions.description: Map of assertion entities, keyed by assertion ID (alphanumeric/hyphens, max 64 chars)

media.description: Map of media entities, keyed by media ID (alphanumeric/hyphens, max 64 chars)
